title: Autocomplete & Next Word Prediction System
description: Real-time autocomplete system using statistical language modeling to predict next words based on context.
longDescription: Built an autocomplete and next-word prediction system using n-gram based language modeling. The system predicts the most probable next word given a sequence of input text, enabling real-time typing assistance similar to search engines and messaging platforms.

details.overview: Designed a real-time autocomplete system that predicts the next word using probabilistic language models trained on text corpora.
details.problem: Given a sequence of words, predict the most likely next word in real time while maintaining low latency and high relevance.
approach: Preprocessed text corpus with tokenization and cleaning
Calculated conditional probabilities for next-word prediction
Implemented smoothing techniques to handle unseen sequences
Designed efficient lookup for real-time inference
Deployed using Streamlit for interactive UI
insights: Higher-order n-grams improve contextual accuracy but increase sparsity
Smoothing is essential to handle unseen word sequences
Trade-off between model complexity and inference latency
Real-time systems require optimized lookup rather than heavy models
details.impact: Built a functional real-time autocomplete system demonstrating core NLP concepts used in search engines and typing assistants.

title: Toxic Comment Classifier
description: Multi-label NLP system for toxic comment classification.

details.overview: Built a system to detect toxic, obscene, threat, insult, and identity-hate comments from Wikipedia discussions.
details.problem: Classify comments into multiple toxicity categories with heavy class imbalance.
approach: One-vs-Rest classification using Logistic Regression and SVM
insights: Bigrams improved detection of toxic phrases
Rare classes like threat are hardest to detect
Linear models perform efficiently on sparse text
details.impact: Achieved strong AUC-ROC and built a scalable moderation pipeline.

title: Geo-Spatial Travel Time Prediction
description: Predict travel time using engineered geospatial features.

details.overview: Built a regression model predicting trip duration using location-based features.
details.problem: Convert raw latitude/longitude into meaningful predictive features.
details.impact: Demonstrated importance of feature engineering in geospatial ML systems.

title: Credit Risk Modeling with XGBoost
description: Predict loan default risk using gradient boosting.

details.overview: Built a credit scoring model predicting financial distress.
details.problem: Handle severe class imbalance in financial datasets.
insights: Income and age significantly influence risk
details.impact: Improved risk prediction accuracy for financial decision-making.

details.overview: Classified 7 bean types using morphological features.
details.impact: Demonstrated effectiveness of ML in agricultural classification.

title: PCA on Wine Dataset
description: Reduce dimensionality for visualization and clustering.

details.overview: Reduced 13 features into 2D space for visualization.
insights: Wine classes are separable in PCA space

details.overview: Clustered customers based on spending behavior.
details.problem: Identify natural groupings without predefined clusters.
insights: Better than K-Means for irregular shapes
details.impact: Enabled meaningful customer segmentation for business insights.

details.overview: Studied mental health trends in tech professionals.
details.problem: Understand treatment patterns and employer support.
details.impact: Highlighted importance of mental health awareness in workplaces.
